title: Add Pixel to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pixel](https://pixel.aesth.lol) to bots
- Pixel is a Discord bot with an economy system and multiple AI features.

Fixes #10906

gist.headline: Pixel perfect
gist.blurb: A new Discord bot called Pixel just sprouted in the greenhouse! It brings a fun economy system and multiple AI features right to your server.
gist.summary: Added Pixel, a Discord bot featuring an economy system and multiple AI capabilities, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and invite the Pixel bot to their Discord servers directly from the pollinations.ai greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee welcoming a cute robot (representing the Discord bot) into a greenhouse setting. The robot can hold a coin to represent the economy system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot welcoming a cute chunky robot companion into a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants. The robot has a CRT monitor head displaying a happy face and holds a shiny gold coin. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot welcoming a cute chunky robot companion into a lush digital greenhouse filled with code-plants. The robot has a CRT monitor head displaying a happy face and holds a shiny gold coin. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
